programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: The World of Us
programme.desc: A bullied girl becomes friends with a new kid during a break, but when classes start up again, their new friendship is nearly ruined when the bullying continues.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Black Light
programme.desc: A car accident leaves one man dead and another in a coma. The dead man's wife ends up learning that the victim had previously tried to kill himself. Suspecting the accident may have been on purpose, she begins an investigation.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Hello, Goodbye

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.desc: Ji Chaoqun was a young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study; then China's spy agency came calling with bags of cash, the promise of glory and an offer that would change his life forever.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: The Deadly Quest for Gold in South Africa
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it; in Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: The Scandal That Rocked the Philippines
programme.desc: A police raid in a small Philippine town reveals a young mayor's alleged links to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: The Zombie Debts Making Wall Street Rich
programme.desc: A police raid in a small Philippine town reveals a young mayor's alleged ties to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: North Korea's Hidden Remote IT Scheme
programme.desc: How an Arizona woman’s house became a gateway for North Korea’s IT operatives, an underground laptop farm that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Race to Merge AI With Humanoid Robots
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they're far from proven; with billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value, or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: AI Is Pushing Chipmaking to Its Limits
programme.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices; global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Race to Fuel a Nuclear Energy Comeback
programme.desc: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: The Business of Adapting to Flood Risk
programme.desc: Scientists are developing more powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion; China's dominance of the supply chain for rare earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: Transforming the Electrical Grid to Power AI
programme.desc: AI's rapid growth is pushing global energy demand skyward, forcing electrical grids to expand and modernize. Now, companies from China to Nigeria are investing in new tech to power the future.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: Why Money Is Flowing Into Geoengineering
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilization; they are finding funding for them.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: How Flying Cars Became a Billion-Dollar Bet
programme.desc: The idea of flying cars has largely remained science fiction, until now; a new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: Why a Lunar Ecosystem Could Be Worth Billions
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon; these efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy; but to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast-paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with guests about global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Mutant Chronicles
programme.desc: In the 28th century a soldier (Thomas Jane) and a priest (Ron Perlman) lead a platoon deep underground to destroy a machine that is churning out hundreds of bloodthirsty mutants.

Two planes almost collide after a flash of light paralyzes an air traffic controller for a few seconds. Suspended from his job, he must now figure out why he's experiencing a repetition of sounds and events in his life at the same time every day.

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A photojournalist must bring his publisher's daughter along when his latest assignment takes him into an area populated by vicious alien beasts.

programme.title: The Last Days on Mars
programme.desc: Astronauts (Liev Schreiber, Elias Koteas, Romola Garai) on Mars contend with a microbe that turns those it infects into zombielike killers.

programme.title: Splinter
programme.desc: A vacationing couple and an escaped convict become trapped by a voracious parasite that devours its victims from the inside out.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer hunts a widow in the wilderness after she escapes from his remote cabin in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: The Canyon
programme.desc: A honeymooning couple has to survive in the Grand Canyon after getting lost.

programme.title: Good Neighbors
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: A doctor (Tom Hiddleston) moves into a London skyscraper where rising tensions and class warfare lead to anarchy.

programme.title: The Ones Below
programme.desc: After giving birth to her first child, a woman (Clémence Poésy) starts to believe that her downstairs neighbors have sinister intentions.

programme.title: Held
programme.desc: A couple's ailing marriage gets put to the test when they are held hostage in an isolated vacation rental by an unseen voice that commands their every move and threatens harm if they don't obey.

programme.title: You Are Not My Mother
programme.desc: In a North Dublin housing estate, Char's mother goes missing. When she returns, Char is determined to uncover the truth of her disappearance and unearth the dark secrets of her family.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: A helplessly romantic sociopath escapes from a mental institution and invades the home of a '90s pop superstar. He just wants to be loved; she just wants to survive.

programme.title: Bad Milo!
programme.desc: A stressed-out man (Ken Marino) discovers that a tiny demon lives in his intestine, and that excessive anxiety causes the creature to escape and slaughter the man's tormentors.

programme.title: John Dies at the End
programme.desc: A new drug promises out-of-body experiences, but users are coming back changed forever, and an otherworldly invasion of Earth is underway.

programme.title: Tucker & Dale vs Evil
programme.desc: Two scruffy pals' (Tyler Labine, Alan Tudyk) backwoods vacation takes a bloody turn when ignorant college students mistake them for a pair of murderous hillbillies.

programme.title: First Date
programme.desc: Conned into buying a shady '65 Chrysler, shy teen Mike's eagerly anticipated first date with the girl next door, Kelsey, implodes as he finds himself targeted by criminals, cops and a crazy cat lady.

programme.title: Rabbit Trap
programme.desc: While collecting audio samples, a musician creates a field recording of a mysterious sound never before heard by human ears. As the echoes of music bleed into the surrounding countryside, ancient and malevolent woodland forces are disturbed.

programme.title: The Windigo
programme.desc: A Native American teenager and his grandmother resurrect an ancient demon to protect their family from backwoods meth dealers. However, they soon discover that the creature's lust for killing can't be controlled.

programme.title: Malice in Wonderland
programme.desc: In London a cab hits a law student, who then goes to a land filled with riffraff.

programme.title: Hobo With a Shotgun
programme.desc: Hoping for heaven but finding an urban hell, a homeless man (Rutger Hauer) takes aim at a crime boss and the man's sadistic sons (Gregory Smith, Nick Bateman).

programme.title: Hobo With a Shotgun
programme.desc: Hoping for heaven but finding an urban hell, a homeless man (Rutger Hauer) takes aim at a crime boss and the man's sadistic sons (Gregory Smith, Nick Bateman).

programme.title: The Burning Sea
programme.desc: A submarine operator descends to the ocean floor to save the man she loves from a sunken oil rig.

programme.title: Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Radio host Alan Partridge (Steve Coogan) gets a chance to boost his sagging career by serving as a liaison between police and his former co-host (Colm Meaney), who has taken hostages at their radio station.

programme.title: 2 Days in New York
programme.desc: A happily married man's (Chris Rock) sanity is pushed to the limit when his wife's (Julie Delpy) crazed, over-sexed French relatives crash their cramped New York apartment.

programme.title: What Just Happened?
programme.desc: A movie producer tries to engineer a reconciliation with his ex-wife while dealing with a number of problems surrounding his latest projects.

programme.title: Barry Munday
programme.desc: A slacker (Patrick Wilson) inherits new responsibilities after he impregnates a stranger (Judy Greer).

programme.title: Best Night Ever
programme.desc: Four young women have a series of wild and raucous adventures during a bachelorette party in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tangerine
programme.desc: After hearing that her boyfriend/pimp cheated on her while she was in jail, a transgender sex worker and her best friend set out to find him and teach him and his new lover a lesson.

programme.title: The Great Buck Howard
programme.desc: A law-school dropout (Colin Hanks) becomes the personal assistant of a self-important but fading mentalist (John Malkovich) who is planning a big comeback.

programme.title: I Give It a Year
programme.desc: After a quick courtship, two lovers decide to tie the knot. As their first year of marriage unfolds, temptation and incompatibility put their relationship in jeopardy.

programme.title: Support the Girls
programme.desc: Lisa is the general manager of Double Whammies, a sports bar that features skimpily dressed waitresses. Always nurturing and protective of her staff, she soon faces one trying day that tests her optimism at every turn.

programme.title: Lemon
programme.desc: After Isaac's blind girlfriend walks out on him, his life goes into free fall, and he directs an unhinged staging of Chekhov's "The Seagull," attends the Passover Seder from hell, and attempts to woo a new flame.

programme.title: Nature Calls
programme.desc: After his troops ditch him for a slumber party at the posh home of his rival brother (Johnny Knoxville), a scoutmaster (Patton Oswalt) lures the youths away in the middle of the night for an ill-advised camping trip.

programme.title: Permanent
programme.desc: Aurelie, 13, dreams about getting a perm so that she can finally fit in at her small-town Virginia school. Things soon go incredibly wrong when her clueless parents bring her to a beauty school to save a few bucks.

programme.title: Person to Person
programme.desc: During a single day in New York City, different characters grapple with the mundane, the unexpected, and the larger questions permeating their lives.

programme.title: Results
programme.desc: Personal trainers (Guy Pearce, Cobie Smulders) are charged with whipping a newly wealthy and highly unmotivated slob (Kevin Corrigan) into shape.

programme.title: The Right Kind of Wrong
programme.desc: A stubborn idealist (Ryan Kwanten) spies a bride (Sara Canning) on her way to her wedding and immediately falls in love with her.

programme.title: The Magic of Belle Isle
programme.desc: An alcoholic, disabled novelist finds his muse again after he moves into a lakeside cabin and meets a single mother and her daughters.

programme.title: Diggers
programme.desc: During the 1970s an independent clammer and his friends watch their way of life slowly disappear when corporate fisheries invade the Hamptons.

programme.title: Tapawingo
programme.desc: When an oddball mailroom worker finds out that his boss's son is being bullied, he forms a ragtag team of would-be mercenaries to protect the boy.

programme.title: World's Greatest Dad
programme.desc: A high-school poetry teacher (Robin Williams) is also a single father and dreams of becoming a successful writer, but a freak accident leads to both tragedy and opportunity.

programme.title: Swan Song
programme.desc: A retired hairdresser escapes his nursing home and embarks on an odyssey across his small town to style a dead woman's hair for her funeral, confronting the ghosts of his past and rediscovering his sparkle along the way.

programme.title: Home for a Royal Heart
programme.desc: When the seaside town of Shaw Bay is under threat of a redevelopment, realtor Erin will do anything to save it.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: As an infestation of Rabbits take over the Drovers Run, Alex finds a baby on his doorstep; Claire meets a puzzling man.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Claire and Peter are spending more time together, but there are signs that Peter may have another life that Claire is unaware of.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: There's a water shortage and the women of Drovers Run are suffering the consequences; shared bathes, stained washing and unflushed toilets.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Meg's world turns upside down when Jodi's father shows up at Drover's Run; Meg remembers why she fell in love with him.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Kevin offers Jodi and Meg a new life; Jodi is voted Miss Gungellan but gives up her crown to go traveling with her dad.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Isolated from Claire because of Peter, Tess finds herself in the middle of the quarrel between Nick and Alex.

programme.title: A Snapshot of Forever
programme.desc: Wedding photographer Jessie Brooke's happy life in her small town is changed when a famous Hollywood actor attends her sister's wedding.

programme.title: Save the Wedding
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a best man and a maid of honor as they work together to save their friends' wedding.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal, a rich party girl, finds a little girl's letter to Santa asking for a new mother, and she vows to win over the father and daughter before the holidays.

programme.title: Song One
programme.desc: After a terrible accident puts her brother in a coma, a graduate student (Anne Hathaway) travels to New York to see him and subsequently becomes involved with the musician (Johnny Flynn) her brother idolized.

programme.title: Deck the Heart
programme.desc: When an EVP inherits a manor, he's expected to host his family for Christmas. Since he doesn't have time or Christmas spirit, he hires an event planner. As Merry decorates and plans, she wins him over and helps him love Christmas again.

programme.desc: Holiday traveling mishaps force a successful business consultant to find a way home with help from a stranger.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: A racist prison guard has an affair with a Black woman after her husband, who was sentenced to capital punishment, dies.

programme.title: Beyond the Lights
programme.desc: A troubled star and an aspiring politician fall deeply in love, but those around the couple urge them to put their careers ahead of romance.

programme.title: Cops and Robbers
programme.desc: A hostage negotiator plays a dangerous game of cat and mouse with a cornered bank robber who is hell-bent on getting out of the bank and humiliating the negotiator in the process.

programme.title: On the Streets of L.A.
programme.desc: An estranged father and son are paroled from the same maximum-security prison with one unusual condition -- they must become roommates.

programme.title: Hendrix
programme.desc: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix (Wood Harris) innovates 1960s rock 'n' roll, then dies of a drug overdose at 27.

programme.title: Precious
programme.desc: Pregnant and abused, a Harlem teen (Gabourey Sidibe) enrolls in an alternative school in an attempt to bring value to her life.

programme.title: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: Three soldiers, including a doctor (Samuel L. Jackson), have difficulty adjusting to life at home following a long and difficult tour of duty in Iraq.

programme.title: Hurricane Season
programme.desc: One year after Hurricane Katrina, coach Al Collins (Forest Whitaker) gathers displaced students and turns them into a championship basketball team.

programme.title: Who Can I Run To?
programme.desc: A gospel singer (Tasha Page Lockhart) renews her faith after reuniting with her former group members.
A Los Angeles high-school teacher (Samuel L. Jackson) confronts violent students with a grudge against him and society.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: Power figures want a Caribbean police chief (Denzel Washington) to find his friend Maubee (Robert Townsend), their scapegoat for a murder.

programme.title: The Last Letter
programme.desc: Catherine Wright struggles with a debilitating sleep disorder. Her husband Michael struggles to cope when their newborn son lay in the wake.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: A former Marine (Michael Jai White) travels to Brazil to hunt down the brutal Japanese mobsters who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: When his brother is killed, LAPD officer Mark leaves the city to return to the island he grew up on. Seeking answers and vengeance, he soon finds himself in a bloody battle with the corrupt tycoon who's taken over the island paradise.

programme.title: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A crime syndicate places a hit on a billionaire's daughter, making her the target of an elite assassin squad. A band of down-and-out mercenaries protects her, fighting tooth and nail to stop the assassins from reaching their target.

programme.title: Traitor
programme.desc: Conflicting evidence leads a federal agent (Guy Pearce) to question the motives behind a former Special Ops soldier's (Don Cheadle) apparent ties to terrorist groups.

programme.title: Leprechaun: Back 2 tha Hood
programme.desc: When Emily Woodrow and her friends happen on a treasure chest full of gold coins, they encounter trouble with a very nasty and protective Leprechaun.

programme.title: Leprechaun in the Hood
programme.desc: When three rappers want to get even with a pimp, they accidentally unleash a leprechaun who goes on a killing rampage in tha 'hood.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: A nurse (Pam Grier) takes revenge on a drug ring for the slaying of her undercover-officer boyfriend.

programme.title: Chain of Command
programme.desc: James Webster returns from duty to find his brother murdered. Now, as he pursues the perpetrators and follows the chain, he discovers a conspiracy that runs deep within the government.

programme.title: As Good as Dead
programme.desc: Bryant befriends a troubled teen and introduces him to martial arts. As Bryant's mysterious and dangerous past catches up to him, he is forced into a life and death struggle to clear his name, save the boy and get back all he left behind.

programme.title: Armed Response
programme.desc: Trained operatives find themselves trapped inside an isolated military compound after its artificial intelligence is suddenly shut down. There, they begin to experience strange and horrific phenomena.

programme.title: Cut Throat City
programme.desc: When Hurricane Katrina devastates New Orleans, four desperate friends band together to pull off a daring heist in the heart of the city.

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: With help from a gangster, a betrayed man (Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson) seeks revenge for a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: The Island

programme.title: Soldier Boyz
programme.desc: An ex-Marine prison counselor leads juvenile offenders on a mission to rescue a tycoon's daughter held hostage in Vietnam.

programme.title: 10 Items or Less
programme.desc: Researching a role at a grocery store, an actor (Morgan Freeman) bonds with a feisty cashier (Paz Vega) who is preparing to interview for a new job.

programme.title: The Reluctant Agent
programme.desc: A waitress is thrust into a deadly game of intrigue when she agrees to impersonate her twin sister, a federal agent.

programme.title: Uncle P
programme.desc: A hip-hop superstar (Percy Miller) has his hands full while watching his sister's three children in the suburbs.

programme.title: Lee Daniels' The Butler
programme.desc: A White House butler (Forest Whitaker) has a front-row seat to history through three decades and seven presidential administrations, including those of Eisenhower (Robin Williams), Kennedy (James Marsden) and Nixon (John Cusack).

programme.title: Fled
programme.desc: Escaped convicts (Laurence Fishburne, Stephen Baldwin) fight while they evade authorities seeking a computer disk on Cuban mobsters.

programme.desc: Teresa está lista para salir de la clínica, pero recibe una inesperada visita. Willy busca enmendar su error con Lucía. Mariló da un paso muy importante en su vida.

programme.title: Trapos íntimos
programme.desc: Federica discute con Beba. Fernando y sus hijas le agradecen a Isabel por todo lo que ha hecho por ellos. Ni Federica ni Dorys quieren a Isabel en la empresa.

programme.title: Trapos íntimos
programme.desc: Willy y Lucía trabajan juntos por una buena causa. Isabel tiene problemas en su trabajo. Fernando pone a Doris en su lugar. Álvaro decide buscar a Zoé.

programme.title: La mujer de Judas
programme.desc: Ven al hombre salir de la casa que fue de Sebastián, mientras Dulce le confiesa a Santia que Simón está vivo.

programme.title: Mis 3 hermanas
programme.desc: Tras perder a su madre, los hermanos Estrada ahora deben lamentar el fallecimiento de su padre. Acaban de quedarse solos en el mundo.

programme.title: Mis 3 hermanas
programme.desc: Tras enterarse de la tragedia que afronta su hermana, Augusto le brinda su apoyo incondicional. Él trabaja en la compañía de su tío y está casado con Margarita.

programme.title: Mis 3 hermanas
programme.desc: El centro de salud donde Lisa trabaja como enfermera corre peligro de ser clausurado. El personal organiza una movilización, lo que molesta a Santiago.

programme.title: Mis 3 hermanas
programme.desc: Margarita emprende un vínculo con Santiago Ortega, en busca de una mejor vida. Él acepta pasar una tarde con ella.

programme.title: Mis 3 hermanas
programme.desc: Bárbara y Santiago eligen una fecha para casarse, pero ella necesita tiempo para los preparativos. Su madre, sin embargo, cree que es una decisión apresurada.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: Interrumpen la ceremonia de casamiento de Jorge y Amarilis.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: María de los Ángeles organiza una recepción con todos sus amigos y enemigos para presentar a su marido.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: Giácomo quiere que Radamés hable con Jorge para convencerlo de casarse con Amarilis.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: Alba Griselda se desmaya por sobredosis de pastillas y Rodrigo se asusta.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: Alba confunde a Orquídea con Rosalinda y le dice que debe destruir a Orquídea. Orquídea se sorprende.

programme.title: María de los Ángeles
programme.desc: Orquídea se alista para castigar a Bernardo luego de acusarlo de no haber matado a Wladimir.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Ninfa se entera por Roque y Olimpia que fueron ellos los que quisieron matar a Valentina. Lirio de Plata visita a Bella en el hospital para preguntarle si es Valentina. Ninfa aparece despampanante en la fiesta del club.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Franklin llega a la clínica y está a punto de encontrar al Lirio de Plata con Bella. Lirio de Plata realiza un atraco en la fiesta del club. Jorge Campos pretende hacer una costosa campaña en la agencia, pero solo negociará con Bella.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Jorge pide un cambio de modelos sugiriendo a Bella y Oréstes. Franklin sigue de cerca a Boligoma e interroga a Muñeca sobre Oréstes. Bella y Oréstes no pueden ocultar sus sentimientos y se besan convincentemente ante la cámara.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Tza-Tzá y Juan Ángel ya no pueden ocultar su atracción. Jorge quiere imágenes de desnudos para la campaña. Olimpia encuentra a su hija Ariadna besando a Lorenzo. Bella y Oréstes quedan atrapados en el lugar tras una tormenta.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Franklin se entera de que Muñeca no es la verdadera madre de Chiqui. Roque logra escapar de sus ataduras y descubre que Pandora ha ido a visitar a Juan Ángel. Bella y Orestes deben pasar la noche juntos en la hacienda.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Chiqui se entera de que Oréstes se ha ido con Bella a la hacienda. Roque amenaza a Jordi para que le entregue a Pandora. Olimpia amenaza a Hugo por sus artículos. Chiquis llega a la hacienda con Franklin y encuentran a Bella en brazos de Oréstes.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Juana explica al comisario que Mauricio se quería entregar. En ese momento, un oficial entrega al comisario la cartera de Mauricio que está entre las víctimas fallecidas.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Carlota se muestra atenta al ver a Juana salir de la casa. Para sí, la joven se pregunta dónde está Mauricio. Desea que su amado se deje ver.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Rogelio hace saber al jefe de Salvador que posiblemente la muerte de De la Vega sea solo un truco.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Díaz informa a Salvador que halló un arma en la oficina de Mauricio. Si comprueban que fue utilizada para matar a Francisco, la culpabilidad de De la Vega estará comprobada.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Al ver que un cuidador entra en la oficina de Armando, Mauricio aprovecha para avanzar hacia la suya. De pronto, entran a la revista Rogelio y Desirée. No obstante, De la Vega y estos no se ven.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Tras repetir a Desirée que debe obedecerlo, Rogelio exige a la mujer que le consiga el documento donde está registrada la deuda que Mauricio tenía con Francisco. Carlota hace saber a su padre y a Desirée que si no regresan a la reunión, ella se irá.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila amenaza a Marcelina con cobrarle todo lo malo que le hizo a su mamá y a ella. La madre superiora intenta hacer recapacitar a Camila para quitarle la idea de vengarse de todos. Astrid planta ideas malas en la mente de Max.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Elk Tenderloin Tostadas and Grilled Rack of Ribs
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights lean elk, first crafting classic Mexican tostadas with grilled tenderloin, avocado, and homemade salsa macha. Then, he grills a whole rack of elk, serving it with creamy colcannon, tarragon emulsion, and rosemary charcoal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Creamy Clam Chowder and Mussels in Spicy Tomato Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern demystifies cooking clams, mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.desc: Kevin & Noah celebrate the 4th of July with a supersized barbecue menu including whole hog BBQ, lobster mac'n cheese, Texas-style char dogs, tri-tip and pinto beans.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: These Smoked Turkey Legs are better than the State Fair
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah smoke up some State Fair Turkey Legs; fry some skillet Chorizo & Eggs; smoke-and-fry some Buffalo Rib Tips; and cook up some Sriracha and Garlic-Butter Grilled Shrimp.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Why LA's Danger Dog is the Best Thing You'll Ever Eat
programme.desc: Kevin & Noah make their twists on some L.A. outdoor classics: Backyard Burgers 2 Ways; Pit-Smoked Pollo Asado; Grilled Mexican Street Corn and Bacon-Wrapped Danger Dogs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Only Pulled Pork Recipe You'll Ever Need
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking up some BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Coleslaw; frying up a skillet of Creole Cabbage; and charcoal-grilling some Steak Sandwiches with Chimichurri Mayo.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Secret to World-Class Texas Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are making brisket 3 ways! They're pit-smoking a classic Texas brisket; showing you how to gussy up a pot of Brisket Baked Beans; and making a charcoal-grilled Vietnamese Brisket Noodle Bowl with all the fixings.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern goes primal with two antelope dishes: a Greek-style whole leg roasted over the open fire with a lemony avgolemono sauce and crispy potatoes, and a simple antelope tenderloin carpaccio served with roasted tomatoes and Parmesan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern starts simmering a classic Italian Bolognese sauce, with ground bison, lots of red wine and tomatoes. Then, he adds marinated bison skirt steak tacos with borracho beans to the tailgate menu.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern breaks down a whole rabbit to grill with a spicy, Sichuan sauce and plate with panzanella.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Goose, one of Andrew's favorite game birds, is prepared two ways: a French onion soup-style grilled breast sandwich with caramelized onions and melted cheese, and a whole bird, cured, roasted on a beer can, and served with an apple-fennel salad.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie hacks his oven into a rotisserie for crispy chicken and chips and bakes a savory spinach and feta pie. Then, the Godfather of Spanish cuisine, Jose Pizarro, shares some gorgeous Mediterranean flavours using just 5 everyday ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.sub-title: Pantry Pasta and Rice Pudding Pops
programme.desc: Jamie raids his pantry for a speedy veggie carbonara and rice pudding popsicles.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie turns frozen fish and veggies into a time saving supper. Then, Italian chef, Gennaro Contaldo rustles up some delicious homemade gnocchi using just 5 easy ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie's dressing a salad with a crown of cheese! He's also got a speedy twist on Sunday roast chicken and an elegant apple tart all with 5 fabulous ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes a low-cost dosa, crispy chicken, oozy barley risotto, beef stew and shortbread biscuits.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes frugal leftovers fun with spaghetti frittata, bakes air-fryer pork pies using affordable mince, and preps a batch of butternut squash dal. Plus, budget-friendly chicken shish kebabs and thrifty mint choc chip whoopie pies!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.sub-title: Easy Stuffed Dumplings and British Fish & Chips
programme.desc: Jamie saves money with easy stuffed leftover dumplings, a budget frozen-fish chip shop cheat, a store-cupboard jar blondie cake, pocket-pleasing pork tacos, and a brilliant air-fryer tinned pineapple tarte tatin dessert!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.sub-title: Comforting Mushroom Soup and Cheesy Soda Bread
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a comforting mushroom soup with cheap air-fryer soda bread for under a fiver, stretches ham hocks into a second teardrop gnocchi meal, makes a low-cost air-fryer chicken burger takeaway clone, and bakes thrifty frozen-berry iced buns!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Summer-y Sweet Pea Risotto and Slow Roasted Pork
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates summer with roasted fennel pork & gratin, oozy pea risotto, and rainbow slaw chicken wraps. He shares edible hanging basket tips. The feast finishes with stunning mackerel on sun-dried tomato couscous with colorful beets.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Buddy's Strawberry Rice Pudding and Summer Tomato Chicken Bake
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a chicken sheet pan dinner with early tomatoes, potatoes and chorizo. Buddy helps pick strawberries for quick jam rice pudding. The summer feast ends with spicy shrimp skewers with homegrown chillies and a refreshing cucumber gazpacho.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Endless Summer: From Grilled Panzanella Salad to Sour Cherry Tart
programme.desc: Jamie ends summer with crispy duck in a rich plum sauce & roast potatoes. Grilled peppers star in panzanella. Garden zucchini become Mediterranean rice. Sweet finale: sour cherry frangipane with crème fraîche.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde is throwin' down a pizza spread like never before with his Chicago-style tavern pie with sausage & onion, a grilled pizza pocket with pepperoni & cheese, chicken wings a la pizzaiola, and a zesty grilled Caesar salad to finish it off.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Dale reinvents pizza night: grilled pizza bagels loaded with pepperoni, mozzarella-stuffed penne vodka pie, a massive grilled chop salad, and olive oil cake with burnt orange caramel. Pizza goals achieved.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde pulls out all the stops for this daddy-sized dinner. He grills up prime rib with herb & horseradish crust, lobster & chili sauce American, charred green beans with garlic tahini, and cheddar-stuffed parker house rolls.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Taco night, Dale-style! Puffy al pastor tacos stuffed with pineapple-chile pork, grilled chicken pipian with charred tomato sauce, crispy street corn ribs, and dulce de leche empanadas. Taco Tuesday who?

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: It's burger day! Chef Dale tackles three classics with a full flavor spin. Game changing Pho Burgers with bone marrow, toasted milk bread Ahi Tuna patty melts, and Chori Pan Burgers with a fried egg and shrimp chips.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: Grilled Loco Moco and Huli Huli Chicken
programme.desc: The options are plentiful when Chef Dale smothers grilled Loco Moco with a mushroom gravy, salty and sweet Huli Huli Chicken with charred pineapple, and healthy scoops of Tuna Water Chestnut poke or mac salad.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Thanksgiving goes to the grill with Chef Dale-juicy spatchcock turkey, grilled sage-cornbread stuffing, smoked green bean casserole, and pumpkin donut bread pudding drenched in bourbon brown butter sauce.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: Wok Cooking On A Charcoal Grill
programme.desc: Anything is possible with a wok and a good ol' charcoal grill, at least if you're Chef Dale, who throws together a heavenly spread of fiery eats, from drunken meats, stir-fried veggies, and stir-fried noodles.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Don't sleep on grilled chicken, especially if it's Chef Dale night to cook! He's serving up Japanese style yakitori three ways, from spicy to sweet to zesty, with crispy rice, and of course he adds his own flair to these delicious skewered snacks.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Comforting and familiar but full of island flavor, right from the grill! Chef Dale roasts pork shoulder with chicharrones, steamy coconut rice and pigeon peas finished with frozen coconut rum drink with a charred banana.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Mediterranean Grilled Filets and Salt Crusted Halibut
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern elevates California halibut, first with grilled fillets on saffron labneh with romesco and roasted cabbage. Then, he demonstrates a classic salt-crusted whole halibut, served with whole roasted cauliflower and a rich cream sauce.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern grills his favorite tender cuts of venison and serves it with coal-roasted sweet potatoes. Then, he cooks a hearty pot of classic Louisiana gumbo using wild duck and grills crispy-skinned duck breast for the topping.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Clams Casino and Garlicky Clam Pizza
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern celebrates cherrystone clams with two show-stopping recipes. He prepares classic grilled clams casino with pancetta, then pushes boundaries with an innovative grilled pizza topped with clams, garlic, chiles, and cheese.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern champions the often-overlooked mackerel with a main salad of pickled filets, charred tomatoes, grilled frisée, and sweet summer peaches. Then, he grills it whole seasoned with caramelized onions, rutabaga mash and charred grapes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Boar Ribs and Shrimp and Grits
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern makes a homemade barbecue rub, basting sauce and barbecue sauce for wild boar ribs. Next, chef shares his twist on a classic southern shrimp and grits recipe, adding a side of beautiful wild mushrooms.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Wild Boar Feast: Chorizo with Mussels and Whole Roasted Leg
programme.desc: Wild boar takes center stage! Andrew makes chorizo with mussels, preserved lemon & white wine. Then, he slow-roasts a whole leg over fire, served Southern-style with pickled cherries, glazed onions & mustard sauce.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern showcases quail two ways: classic Southern fried quail with lemon-basil aioli, and as an elevated topping for a traditional open-fire paella, complete with crispy socarrat. He proves this small bird makes an extraordinary dinner.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Zimmern cooks his version of Peking-style goose. Next, Chef Zimmern cooks a meal of striped bass.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern makes two different dishes with red snapper: fried snapper fingers with a spicy chile-orange mayonnaise dipping sauce and a slow-roasted whole fish with a herb salad and charred miso sweet potatoes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Southern Shrimp Skewers and Asian Crispy Rice
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern grills beloved shrimp in two distinct ways. He starts with jumbo shrimp and country ham skewers glazed with sweet-hot pepper jelly. Then, he creates Asian-inspired shrimp, served over crispy basmati rice and a complex sambal.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is a trio of backyard burgers! We're making Oklahoma Smashed Onion Burgers, New York Steakhouse Burgers and Fries, and Bougie Castle-Inspired Sliders.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're grilling our three favorite styles of pizza tonight: Chicago Tavern with Sausage and Hot Giardiniera, New York Ricotta and Hot Honey, and a spicy Detroit Pepperoni.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: It's sandwich night! We're making our favorite handheld late-night delights: Chicken Parm Hero, (Not a Philly) Cheesesteak, and Bodega Chopped Cheese. We're going to light the grills, pour some drinks, and show you how to make 'em in your backyard.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're making our late-night breakfast for dinner standards with the Waffle House All-Star, Steak and Eggs, and a Fast Food Sausage Breakfast Sandwich.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: The Grill Dads bring late-night Mexican food truck eats to your backyard with pollo al pastor tacos, Mission-style carne asada burritos, and mini beef chimichangas.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is all about chicken comfort-food dishes: a Gochujang Hot Honey Chicken Sandwich, Almost Buffalo Wings, and a Spicy Chicken Salad Wrap. We're going to light the grills, pour some drinks, and show you how to make 'em in your backyard.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares Carne Adovada.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Yellowtail Collars & Filets with Miso Sauce
programme.desc: Andrew cooks yellowtail two ways: grilled collars with a sweet, savory Filipino-inspired adobo sauce, and grilled filets with miso sauce, shiso butter, and charred vegetables. A lesson in using the whole fish and getting more from every cut.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Minnesota's forests for wild mushrooms. He creates a simple grilled mushroom salad, then hand-shapes cavatelli pasta tossed with golden chanterelles, butter, garlic, thyme, and colatura. He shares foraging and cleaning tips.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Nashville Hot Pheasant and Mint Basil Lemonade
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern takes a spin on Nashville-style hot fried chicken. Hot and spicy, batter coated, crispy fried pheasant is paired with a spinach salad topped with bacon vinaigrette and ice-cold mint basil lemonade.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Bison Brats & Grilled Kebabs on Flatbread
programme.desc: Andrew butchers a whole bison leg before diving in to grinding meat for bison brats, grilling them up and topping with homemade spicy mustard. Then, he grills Middle Eastern-inspired kebabs to serve over flatbread for a feast built for sharing.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: For pig roast perfection, Chef Andrew Zimmern marinates a whole hog.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Never underestimate the power of squash: they're affordable, abundant, and they come in all shapes, sizes, colors, and textures. Frankie spotlights squash from summer through winter highlighting their amazing superhero traits.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: No matter who you're rooting for, savor these ballpark favorites while beating those major league prices.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie harnesses the power of time to transform simple ingredients into flavorful goods that'll stick around for a long time. Learn the basics of preserving, pickling & curing to make dinner anything but a struggle. It just takes a little patience.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: It's no secret that pasta is Frankie's favorite; he's serving it up all night without even opening his fridge.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie's slicing, mashing and smashing his way through the spud species, a staple for any Struggle kitchen.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie teaches several methods for cooking eggs; the scramble, the omelet, and the Benedict; learn to make them just the way one likes them.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie cooks his way back in time with his favorite vintage recipes. These oldie-but-goodie dishes are not only nostalgic and comforting, but they'll also fill you up without costing you a pretty penny.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Warm and hearty bowls of veggies, beans, pasta, and more, these soups will have you returning for seconds all year round. Frankie's soup blueprints can turn everyday ingredients into extraordinary soups, with endless flavor opportunity.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: In a sandwich, every component plays a role. With a supporting cast of fixin's, and Frankie's cost-saving homemade twists, these sandwiches just might steal the show.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Cabbage has long been an underrated green on the field, and it's about time Frankie gives it a starring role. This leafy head proves itself as the versatile ingredient we need it to be, affordable year around, delicious and filling.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Who knew mayo could be such a savvy secret agent? It's a controversial condiment that can unlock the buttery, crispy, decadent codes of our favorite dishes, without leaving a trace of mayo-ness. Best of all, it's easy to make at home!

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Reaching textural nirvana is never easy, but Frankie explores several ways to achieve the perfect crunch in his dishes, both savory and sweet. Add this elusive element to your recipes without adding cost to your budget.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes a low-cost dosa, crispy chicken, oozy barley risotto, beef stew and shortbread biscuits.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes frugal leftovers fun with spaghetti frittata, bakes air-fryer pork pies using affordable mince, and preps a batch of butternut squash dal. Plus, budget-friendly chicken shish kebabs and thrifty mint choc chip whoopie pies!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.sub-title: Easy Stuffed Dumplings and British Fish & Chips
programme.desc: Jamie saves money with easy stuffed leftover dumplings, a budget frozen-fish chip shop cheat, a store-cupboard jar blondie cake, pocket-pleasing pork tacos, and a brilliant air-fryer tinned pineapple tarte tatin dessert!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.sub-title: Comforting Mushroom Soup and Cheesy Soda Bread
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a comforting mushroom soup with cheap air-fryer soda bread for under a fiver, stretches ham hocks into a second teardrop gnocchi meal, makes a low-cost air-fryer chicken burger takeaway clone, and bakes thrifty frozen-berry iced buns!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Creamy Chicken Pot Pie and Chocolate Tiramisu
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisù.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Jarred Pepper Pasta and Sheet Pan Brisket
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy jarred-pepper pasta, crispy chicken in baked-bread sauce, and a beef brisket tray bake - all prepped in minutes. He makes shelf-raid spiced haricot beans, and rounds it all off with a fast and simple strawberry & balsamic tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy midweek chicken tray bake. He shows us cool ways to upgrade salmon, knocks up a shelf-raid quesadilla toastie, and transforms a batch-cook Bolognese into cheesy bread bowls. All finished off with a super simple banoffee tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Smash Burger and Creamy Chicken with Mushrooms
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek meal of speedy sweet pea chicken, a juicy Smash burger and a chicken and mushroom rice traybake. He batch-cooks his seven-veg sauce, followed by a spicy fish soup. And finishes off with a perfect pudding of tinned fruit granita.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie shares a simple salmon dish perfect for a midweek meal, and some no-fuss fish cakes made from tins. He cooks a lamb Madras traybake, as well as a no-cook pasta sauce, and crowns it all off with a hot and crispy ice cream parcel!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy midweek chicken tray bake. He shows us cool ways to upgrade salmon, knocks up a shelf-raid quesadilla toastie, and transforms a batch-cook Bolognese into cheesy bread bowls. All finished off with a super simple banoffee tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Tre and Amanda have been living in a rental for nearly three years, and as the kids get bigger their temporary home is getting smaller. They're ready to find a place of their own and are determined to stay in their exclusive lakefront community.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Bachelor Kyle's father Jack has helped him renovate his new home, but the backyard is still unusable. To help Kyle throw the ultimate housewarming party, Brian and Sarah build a sexy sports pub, a lounge area and a fire pit.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Tina and her husband Patrick have a home that is overrun with both baking supplies and soccer equipment. To extend this family's living space, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into one part cake decorating studio and one part soccer field.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Mom and son duo, Paul and Catharine, are overwhelmed by Paul's multi-level backyard. Paul also finds his current indoor fitness regime frustrating. Brian and Sarah muscle up to the challenge by building a gym in his backyard, alongside a hot tub.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Andrea and David are foodies, but hosting in their "builder basic" yard is no fun. Brian and Sarah make their farm-to-table dreams come true, with a veggie garden, dining room, BBQ zone, and a play space for their 2 kids.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Aarati & Dave both work from home, forcing their living room to be a triple duty working/living/children's play area. Brian and Sarah create a flexible structure, install a sleek and sophisticated plunge pool, and create an outdoor fireplace lounge.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Debbie, Kevin, and their three children are a newly-blended family. To bring this new family together, Brian and Sarah build an irresistible treehouse village in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Couple Farzana & Reyan have maxed out all living space in their city-sized bungalow, leaving no room for Reyan's at-home stained-glass business or Farzana's writing. Brian and Sarah build Reyan a spacious studio and construct an inspiring deck area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Carly & Nate's social media star dog, Dean the Basset Hound, has a lot of four-legged friends visiting, leaving the home feeling cramped. Brian and Sarah make a bar/lounge for pet and owner gatherings, along with a stylish outdoor entertainment area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Steve and Tanya are Realtors who just bought their forever home a few doors down from Tanya's parents. To complete their dream home, Brian and Sarah build a dream cottage retreat in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Jenn and Josh don't have enough space in their semi-detached home to enjoy their hobbies. Brian and Sarah build a stylish lounge space and convert the existing garage into a multipurpose space for crafting and playing guitar.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A 300-year-old Scottish ruin that's been brought back to life. In the Sierra Nevada mountain, an angular home built from zinc and glass. In Sardinia a stunning waterfront villa. And in Germany, a wartime bunker that lay abandoned for 70 years.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Head to the Serra Da Mantiqueira Mountains, Brazil, to explore a 2000 square metre, grid-shaped family home hidden in nature, then visit a wartime bunker on the Isle of Wight in the UK that's been transformed into an ultra modern home.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A striking modern home has been built out of flint, and then to Switzerland to see a sleek glass residence next to a scenic lake. Deep In the woods in New York State, a far-from-average tree house that serves as a dream getaway for a family of five.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: In the Cotswolds, UK, a unique home built into a lake. Lake Ontario, a home that resembles an ocean liner, and then to Portugal, where in land, a ruin has been transformed into a minimalist's dream with a pool concealed in the roof.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Venture into the Spanish countryside to explore an enchanting villa. A cliffside retreat that is ultra-modern. In rural Quebec, a cabin that resembles a pair of binoculars perched on a cliff, and finally a woodland retreat in Portugal.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Explore a palatial cliff-top villa complete with indoor and outdoor pools. A remote cliff-top home deep in West Virginia and then uncover a retreat built into rocks on the rural outskirts of Stockholm.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A futuristic villa built on the edge of a lake in Austria. A cabin perched on the edge of a river. A unique beachside house built into the rock, and in rural England a modern mirrored house, designed to blend into and reflect its rural setting.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A Norwegian mountain cabin that is so remote it is only accessed by helicopter. A family retreat embedded into rocks in the Californian desert. In Brazil, an epic jungle lodge.

programme.desc: Nicole and Caffrey design an executive rental suite to help supplement Vashti's path to retirement, while real estate agent Kelsey pursues Nicole and Caffrey's much-needed staging expertise to help sell her clients' colorful and chaotic townhouse.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: With renters in the basement, Sarah and Shawn have nowhere to go but up to find some tranquility. Nicole and Caffrey take on their dated bedroom and ensuite to create an elevated oasis.

programme.title: Backyard Builds

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Ex-city slickers, Lauren and Mark, miss their friends and family from the city. Brian and Sarah create a country retreat with an outdoor pad, indoor dining lounge, and a chicken coop. When Lauren and Mark's friends visit, they'll never want to leave.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Janet's love for her nine grandkids is endless. But so is the chaos they bring inside her home when they come visit. To take that energy outside, Brian and Sarah build a fun kid-zone in the backyard, but also a sophisticated adult area for Janet.

programme.desc: Gualberto "Weber" Elizondo surprised his family when his grilling hobby turned him into a local celebrity and internet sensation. Meanwhile, chef Chuy Villareal of Cara De Vaca wants the world to know that the north of Mexico isn't just carne asada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Two sisters made a little shack on the Rio Ramos into a must-visit restaurant known for one dish: cortadillo stew. Down the road, another restaurant uses traditional stews in their famous empalmes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Nuevo León is divided between two pro soccer teams: Los Tigres and Los Rayados. Pati tries the food at each stadium with the teams' stars to determine who wins in the battle of tortas vs tacos.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Irving Quiroz wrote the book on Mexican bread. Pati visits his workshop for his secret to making the perfect campechana, then meets Chuy Elizondo, owner of one of the hottest brunch spots in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: The Garza family invites Pati to their vineyard to help the community make piloncillo - and it's hard work! Then, in the magic town of Bustamante, three sisters make traditional bread in adobe ovens.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Gaby Molinar owns Huerto Urbano, an urban farm dedicated to providing Monterrey with nutritious, diverse local ingredients. And her husband is one of the region's greatest culinary pioneers.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Cantina Culture and the Morning After?
programme.desc: Cantinas have historically been bars where men gather to drink and sing about their broken hearts. Historian David Canales takes Pati to historic locations. Then she tries the best tacos in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Texas BBQ in the Orange Belt
programme.desc: Pati visits BBQ champion Luis Rivas to taste his Mexican take on Texas-style BBQ, and he hosts a traditional carne asada at his family's orange grove. Then Pati learns how Glorias candies are made.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Chef Hugo Guajardo researches the best of Nuevo León's ingredients. He and Pati visit a family-owned restaurant that has perfected the art of drying meat. Then, she tries his famed charred chicken.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's climber friends take her on an adventure to the Sierra Madre mountains, followed by a quick elote snack. Later, Pati connects with four top chefs for a carne asada with a mountain backdrop.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: The Nectar of the Mayan Gods
programme.desc: Pati is in the magic town of Maní to learn about something sacred to the Mayans - bees and honey. A group of women who protect the endangered Melipona, a stingless bee native to Yucatán, invites her to join in a Mayan energy cleansing ritual.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Tekit, the capital of the Guayabera, Pati encounters a tale of sons going against their father's wishes to follow their own path. Pati meets a farmer's son who went against his father to build a family business making the iconic Guayabera shirts.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits the pizza capital of Italy to learn recipes from the locals and tries acquapazza, fish poached in crazy water.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie gets a masterclass in Sicilian sweets and cooking up an epic tuna, prawn and pistachio spaghetti. There's also some chocolaty cannoli.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits Basilicata in search of some old school Italian recipes and meets a family of shepherds and an 89-year-old macaroni master.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie tracks down some fast, fresh and easy recipes, featuring tasty minty pea tortiglioni and gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is taking spaghetti bolognese to the next level and re-creating a mind-blowing Jewish-Italian recipe. There's also beef stew with pappardelle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.sub-title: Best of Salina's Land and Sea
programme.desc: Jamie returns to cooking the food he loves the most, getting right to heart of the Italian kitchen.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie heads for one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, making hand-crafted pasta, a special seafood stew, and the region's answer to paella.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke arrives in Saigon for a breakfast of iced coffee with condensed milk and a vermicelli noodle dish. Later, he visits his favorite Pho restaurant, then cooks up some spicy Chili Crab Claws.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.sub-title: Malaysian Flying Noodles and Pork Bone Soup
programme.desc: In Kuala Lumpur, Luke meets the famous Mr Hung with a reputation for flying instant noodles and Mr Sou who cooks a hearty Pork Bone Soup with medicinal herbal properties.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food adventure exploring Jakarta, a melting pot of diverse cultural cuisines, where he indulges in an Indonesian dessert, the sweet Martabak, known as the "King of Street Food".

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.sub-title: Secret Family Recipies in Ho Chi Minh
programme.desc: Luke searches to find Ho Chi Minh's old markets before they disappear due to District 1's rapid development. Join Luke as he gathers fresh ingredients from a local market, tries some traditional delicacies, and follows his sweet tooth to Marou.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
